data.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute urges Samourai's exoneration as petition reaches 3,200 signatures, deeming their legal action unjust.
data.description: A leading Washington think tank, along with influential figures in the Bitcoin community, have expressed concern over the imprisonment of the Samourai Wallet developers on charges related to an alleged conspiracy as unlicensed money transmitters. They argue that this legal action effectively criminalizes the development of non-custodial code. The incident has sparked a debate on the implications for the tech industry and the broader digital currency landscape. The case has garnered attention, with the number of Bitcoin supporters voicing support for the developers growing rapidly across various platforms.

data.title: Phemex launches $450,000 Futures Trading Apex Competition, global challenge December 4-31, 2025 for crypto traders.
data.description: In Samoa, on December 4, 2025, Phemex, a crypto exchange focusing on user experience, revealed the launch of the Second Edition of the Futures Trading Apex Competition. This global year-end competition will take place from December 4 to 31, 2025, featuring a prize pool totaling 450,000 USDT. By organizing this event, Phemex is demonstrating its dedication to providing engaging opportunities for its users.

data.title: INJ price expected to recover to $7.50-$8.00 range, implying 23-32% upside in 4-6 weeks based on oversold signals and analyst views.
data.description: The forecast for INJ price indicates a potential increase of 23-32%, reaching the range of $7.50 to $8.00. This projection is based on oversold technical indicators converging with analyst predictions for a moderate-term revival.

data.title: Körber receives top "Platinum" rating in CyberVadis 2025 for cybersecurity, surpassing previous ratings.
data.description: In Hamburg, Germany, on December 4, 2025, Körber received the prestigious Platinum Medal for its excellence in cybersecurity in the CyberVadis rating for 2025. This accolade represents a significant advancement from the company's previous ratings. CyberVadis, a subsidiary of EcoVadis, is a prominent entity in the cybersecurity sector. This recognition showcases Körber's commitment to cybersecurity and underscores its leading position in the industry.

data.title: VCT's Finlets to be installed on Norwegian's entire Boeing 737-800 fleet, enhancing sustainability and operational efficiency.
data.description: In Seattle on December 4, 2025, Vortex Control Technologies and Norwegian made known a new partnership agreement. They have decided to implement VCT's Finlet modification on Norwegian's complete Boeing 737-800 aircraft fleet. This move showcases Norwegian's dedication to enhancing operational efficiency.

data.title: Autonomous Inc. expands into AI hardware and robotics, revolutionizing AI-powered workspace products. #FutureTech
data.description: In Riverside, California on December 4, 2025, Autonomous Inc. unveiled a major development in its product offerings. The renowned technology firm, known for transforming the AI-driven workplace, revealed a substantial strategic growth in its product lineup. Expanding beyond its current focus on ergonomic solutions and AI technologies for office spaces, the company is poised to make a strong impact in the market.

data.title: Telenor celebrates 25 years on Oslo Stock Exchange, distributing over NOK 243 billion to shareholders since 2000.
data.description: Today, Telenor marked 25 years since being listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange. Since its 2000 listing, the company has given over NOK 243 billion to its shareholders.

data.title: KuCoin launches Lite Mode for beginners to enter crypto easily. Trust-oriented platform introduces guided, low-friction trading. #KuCoin #cryptocurrency
data.description: KuCoin, a prominent worldwide cryptocurrency platform focused on trust, has introduced KuCoin Lite Mode on Dec. 4, 2025, in Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands. This new feature aims to provide users with a clean, guided, and low-friction trading experience. With a strong emphasis on trust, KuCoin is dedicated to offering an easy trading environment for customers.

data.title: Dec. 4, 2025: Wing Assistant named top choice for growing companies by Expert Consumers for virtual support.
data.description: In a recent report released on Dec. 4, 2025, Expert Consumers highlighted Wing Assistant as a top choice for companies looking for dependable virtual assistance in the upcoming year. The evaluation covered various services aimed at aiding businesses in adapting to the challenges of contemporary times.

data.title: Visa and Circle partner to launch Vietnam's first AI PayLater card to address credit card adoption challenges, set to launch in early 2026.
data.description: Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) and Pismo have partnered with Circle Asia Technologies for expansion in Vietnam. Circle Asia Technologies, a credit-focused neobank in Southeast Asia, will launch Vietnam's first fully AI-driven PayLater card in early 2026. This partnership aims to address the limited credit card adoption in Vietnam by providing transparency, personalization, and an enhanced user experience. The AI-driven PayLater card will offer users quick credit-building, instant approvals, and secure purchase options. This collaboration signifies a strategic move towards increasing financial inclusion in the Vietnamese market.

data.title: Long-term exposure to air pollutants linked to advanced heart disease, study of 11,000 adults finds. Women affected more.
data.description: In Chicago on December 4, 2025, research revealed that prolonged exposure to typical air pollutants correlates with the progression of coronary artery disease. A significant study involving over 11,000 adults highlighted varying impacts on women and men. This data was disclosed at the annual meeting, showcasing the concerning effects of common air pollutants on cardiovascular health.

data.title: CRV price aims for $0.55-$0.76 by Jan 2026 with bullish MACD momentum seen. Analysts bullish on Curve hitting key resistance levels.
data.description: The cryptocurrency CRV is experiencing a surge in bullish momentum as indicated by the positive turn in the MACD histogram. Analysts are predicting a medium-term target price range of $0.55 to $0.76 for Curve as it surpasses significant resistance levels.

data.title: Stafford creates Timberland Continuation Fund worth $1.2 billion, merging three existing funds.
data.description: London-based firm Stafford Capital Partners has recently revealed the creation of a major investment vehicle worth USD 1.2 billion. This new entity, known as the Stafford International Timberland Continuation Fund, consolidates three of the company's key timberland funds – Stafford International Timberland funds VI, VII, and VIII. The move signifies a crucial step in the firm's long-term management strategy for its timberland assets, as the Continuation Fund is designed to operate indefinitely.

data.title: FLOKI may hit $0.00007321 by March 2026, indicating 64% upside from current levels. Support at $0.00004105, resistance at $0.00004626.
data.description: The forecast for FLOKI suggests a possible 64% increase to $0.00007321, despite the prevailing negative market sentiment. Key levels to watch are support at $0.00004105 and resistance at $0.00004626.
